name: Magnus
description: The versatile Magnus revolver is a lethal sidearm for any Tenno.

Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Baruuk Prime: Hotfix 32.2.5
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Perrin Sequence Rank 4 sacrifice of Pandero Prime Receiver to Magnus Prime Barrel.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage and fire rate of the Ember Specter’s Magnus secondary.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Magnus magazine not ejecting properly during reload while riding K-Drive.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.4
patchlogs.changes: Removed Magnus shell casing eject sounds to match revolver aesthetic / animation.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes: Magnus series damage increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Increased the damage of all Magnus weapons in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Slightly increased the damage of the AKMagnus in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.9.2
patchlogs.changes:
Small improvements to AkMagnus: proc chance increased to 25%, crit chance increased to 25%, crit multiplier increased to 2.
Corrected AkMagnus fire/equip/reload animations and sounds.
